summary: Phase 3 Analytics & Performance testing complete. Backend: 12/12 pytest tests PASSED (100%) - all analytics endpoints working correctly. Frontend: Admin Analytics Dashboard fully functional with all components verified. GZip compression confirmed working via content-encoding: gzip header.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/analytics/event accepts event with session_id and page fields
Backend: POST /api/analytics/event returns 400 when event field missing
Backend: POST /api/analytics/batch accepts array of events and returns count
Backend: POST /api/analytics/batch returns 400 when events array empty
Backend: GET /api/analytics/dashboard without auth returns 401
Backend: GET /api/analytics/funnel without auth returns 401
Backend: GET /api/analytics/dashboard (admin) returns total_events, unique_sessions, event_counts, daily_breakdown, top_pages
Backend: GET /api/analytics/funnel (admin) returns funnel counts and conversion_rates
Backend: GZip compression working - content-encoding: gzip header present
Backend: API health endpoint works with Accept-Encoding: gzip
Backend: page_view event tracking via /api/analytics/batch
Backend: signup_click event tracking via /api/analytics/batch
Frontend: Landing page hero headline 'Discover Winning Ecommerce Products Before They Go Viral'
Frontend: Landing page hero CTA 'Start Free Product Discovery' links to /signup
Frontend: Pricing page shows 3 tiers at £19/£49/£99
Frontend: /admin/analytics page loads Analytics Dashboard
Frontend: Analytics Dashboard shows overview stats (Total Events, Unique Sessions, Unique Users, Signup Rate)
Frontend: Analytics Dashboard shows Conversion Funnel with steps (Landing Visits, Signup Clicks, Signups, Product Views, Upgrade Clicks)
Frontend: Analytics Dashboard shows Event Breakdown (page_view, signup_click, signup_complete, cta_click)
Frontend: Analytics Dashboard shows Top Pages
Frontend: Analytics Dashboard has period filter buttons (7d, 14d, 30d)
seed_data_creation: Test events created via /api/analytics/event and /api/analytics/batch during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Analytics & Performance features fully verified. Key components: 1) POST /api/analytics/event - accepts event with session_id and page, 2) POST /api/analytics/batch - accepts array of events, returns count, 3) GET /api/analytics/dashboard - admin only, returns total_events, unique_sessions, event_counts, daily_breakdown, top_pages, 4) GET /api/analytics/funnel - admin only, returns funnel counts and conversion_rates, 5) GZipMiddleware working (content-encoding: gzip header), 6) PageTracker component in App.js fires page_view on route changes, 7) Admin analytics dashboard at /admin/analytics shows all analytics data.
mocked_apis_note: No mocked APIs - All endpoints use real MongoDB analytics_events collection
